messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The dependency-gate tests boot the real engine serially in one file, so that file alone is the suite's wall clock
What it solves: THE ASK. Split the three long-pole unit-test files so the suite's wall clock drops. The
Operator profiled it (clean run, 2026-07-14 ~07:03Z): 250 files, 3,458 tests, 83s of
file-time compressed into 12.0s wall across 20 workers. Median file: 14ms. The body of
the suite is genuinely fast. Wall clock…
How it works: The split loses no test

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-375 - The dependency-gate tests boot the real engine serially in one file, so that file alone is the suite's wall clock is complete.
